actionConfiguration.body:
INSERT INTO pbb_upper_wip_input (wip_id, input_kind, input_ref)
SELECT wip_id, input_kind, input_ref
FROM (
  SELECT
    new_w.id AS wip_id,
    wi.input_kind,
    CASE
      WHEN wi.input_kind = 'PART'::wip_input_kind_enum THEN (
        SELECT np.id
        FROM pbb_part np
        JOIN pbb_part op ON op.part_id = np.part_id
        WHERE op.id = wi.input_ref
        AND np.session_id = {{this.params.newSessionId}}
        LIMIT 1
      )
      WHEN wi.input_kind = 'WIP'::wip_input_kind_enum THEN (
        SELECT new_w2.id
        FROM pbb_upper_wip new_w2
        JOIN pbb_upper_wip old_w2 ON old_w2.label = new_w2.label
        WHERE old_w2.id = wi.input_ref
        AND new_w2.session_id = {{this.params.newSessionId}}
        LIMIT 1
      )
    END AS input_ref
  FROM pbb_upper_wip_input wi
  JOIN pbb_upper_wip old_w ON old_w.id = wi.wip_id
  JOIN pbb_upper_wip new_w ON new_w.label = old_w.label
    AND new_w.session_id = {{this.params.newSessionId}}
  WHERE old_w.session_id = {{this.params.oldSessionId}}
) sub
WHERE input_ref IS NOT NULL;
